header_text: Route 46 detoured off 50th St/Vernon Ave from Eden Ave to Eden Ave beginning Wed Apr 23 at 5:00 AM until further notice due to construction
short_header_text: Route 46 detoured off 50th St/Vernon Ave from Eden Ave to Eden Ave beginning Wed Apr 23 at 5am until further notice
description_text:
For eastbound Route 46 get on/off buses at:
Eden-Vernon Busway & Sherwood/Vernon Ave - Stop #220 (westbound)
Temporary stop Eden Ave & Arcadia Ave (eastbound)
Temporary stop Eden Ave & 50th St W (eastbound)
50th St W & Browndale Ave - Stop #982 (eastbound)

For westbound Route 46 get on/off buses at:
50th St W & Browndale Ave - Stop #214 (westbound)
Temporary stop Eden Ave & Grange Rd (westbound)
Temporary stop Eden Ave & Arcadia Ave (westbound)
Eden-Vernon Busway & Sherwood/Vernon Ave - Stop #220 (westbound)

Eastbound buses will travel regular route on Vernon Ave to Eden Ave, right on Eden, right on 50th St, and resume regular route.

Westbound buses will travel regular route on 50th St to Eden Ave, left on Eden, left on Sherwood Rd, and resume regular route.

Affected stops:
